trigger_command:
git add vite.config.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: stub node-fetch for browser build compatibility

node-fetch pulled in transitively via @ai-sdk/google-vertex breaks
Vite's browser build. Stub it since the app uses native fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main 2>&1
